tasks.label: hms: sync webapp to tomcat
args: $src='${workspaceFolder}\src\main\webapp'; $dst='C:\apache-tomcat-10.1.52\webapps\Hospital-Management-System'; if (-not (Test-Path $dst)) { Write-Error "Tomcat app folder not found: $dst"; exit 1 }; robocopy $src $dst /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: hms: compile java
args: if (-not (Get-Command javac -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Error 'javac not found in PATH. Install JDK and set PATH/JAVA_HOME.'; exit 1 }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force '${workspaceFolder}\build\classes' | Out-Null; $libs = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}\src\main\webapp\WEB-INF\lib\*.jar' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $cp = @('${workspaceFolder}\build\classes') + $libs; $cpJoined = [string]::Join(';', $cp); $sources = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}\src\main\java' -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; if ($sources.Count -eq 0) { Write-Output 'No Java files found.'; exit 0 }; & javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp $cpJoined -d '${workspaceFolder}\build\classes' $sources; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: hms: sync classes to tomcat
args: $src='${workspaceFolder}\build\classes'; $dst='C:\apache-tomcat-10.1.52\webapps\Hospital-Management-System\WEB-INF\classes'; if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { Write-Error "Build output missing: $src"; exit 1 }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dst | Out-Null; robocopy $src $dst /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: hms: tomcat stop
args: $tomcat='C:\apache-tomcat-10.1.52'; if (-not (Test-Path $tomcat)) { Write-Error "Tomcat folder not found: $tomcat"; exit 1 }; $javaHomeLine = & java -XshowSettings:properties -version 2>&1 | Select-String 'java.home = ' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $javaHomeLine) { Write-Error 'Cannot determine java.home. Ensure JDK is installed and java is in PATH.'; exit 1 }; $javaHome = ($javaHomeLine.ToString().Split('=')[1]).Trim(); $env:JAVA_HOME = $javaHome; $env:JRE_HOME = $javaHome; Set-Location "$tomcat\bin"; cmd /c shutdown.bat

tasks.label: hms: tomcat start
args: $tomcat='C:\apache-tomcat-10.1.52'; if (-not (Test-Path $tomcat)) { Write-Error "Tomcat folder not found: $tomcat"; exit 1 }; $javaHomeLine = & java -XshowSettings:properties -version 2>&1 | Select-String 'java.home = ' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $javaHomeLine) { Write-Error 'Cannot determine java.home. Ensure JDK is installed and java is in PATH.'; exit 1 }; $javaHome = ($javaHomeLine.ToString().Split('=')[1]).Trim(); $env:JAVA_HOME = $javaHome; $env:JRE_HOME = $javaHome; Set-Location "$tomcat\bin"; cmd /c startup.bat
